title: Better PvP
description: This modpack is for Hypixel Bedwars/Duels and helps you get better FPS for smoother gameplay.
body:
## Better PvP - High FPS for PvP
The Better PvP Modpack is made to give players a real advantage in Minecraft PvP. It works great on version 1.8.9 and many others, helping you fight better in every match. Whether you’re dueling on Hypixel or playing Bedwars, it makes your gameplay smoother and boosts your FPS.

**Optimized for PvP**: Hit registration feels sharper, controls are smoother, and everything responds faster, so you can react quicker and play better.

**Better FPS**: With mods like FPS Reducer and AI Improvements, your game runs smoothly, even on lower-end PCs and laptops, without changing the original Minecraft feel.

**Hypixel-Ready**: Fully compatible with Hypixel Bedwars and other PvP servers, so you can focus on playing at your best without any issues.

**Customizable**: You can add or remove mods to fit your style, while still keeping all the FPS and PvP improvements.


![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c605ef2d2380b243b4bcb2190e7ed7decbb0684d.webp)

## Mods in 1.8.9 Forge:
- Dark Transparent GUI by Pabli
- Default Dark Mode by neblur
- Entity Culling by tr7zw
- FPS Reducer by bre2el
- Hypixel Plus by ic22487
- Hytils Reborn by Polyfrost
- Modernity by AstroTibs
- Phosphor Legacy Forge by HowardZHY
- PolyPatcher by Polyfrost
- PolySprint by Polyfrost
- PvP Crosshair by Alix_x_X_or_Alixxx_please
- Simple PvP Edit by Gamer22109
- ViaForge by florianreuth
